metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_211
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Quantitative mass spectrometry and immunoblotting of highly purified synaptic vesicles from the rat brain indicate that Rab6a copurifies with synaptic vesicles.

The SV/homogenate enrichment ratios of Rab6A and 6B are 1.68 (WB) and 2.59 and 3.37 (iTRAQ), respectively in the Pavlos paper. However, no co-localisation of either rabs with synaptophysin puncta was observed (Table 1). I used the term co-purify rather than enrichment to more strictly distinguish if a protein is just present in a biochemical fractionation versus if additional evidence is available to support that it is also spatially present or enriched in the SVs by microscopic methods.. Experimental description: Legend to Figure 2 "Enrichment profiles of Rab GTPases on purified SVs isolated from rat brain homogenates, determined by quantitative immunoblotting"
